scripts.dev:bot: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const env=fs.existsSync('bot/.env')?fs.readFileSync('bot/.env','utf8'):'';const has=(k)=>Boolean(process.env[k])||new RegExp('^'+k+'=.+','m').test(env);process.exit(has('BOT_TOKEN')&&has('BOT_INTERNAL_API_KEY')?0:1)" && npm --workspace bot run dev || echo "[dev:bot] skipped: set BOT_TOKEN and BOT_INTERNAL_API_KEY in bot/.env"
scripts.build: npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace web run build && npm --workspace bot run build
